title: selaginella sobolifera
intro: Selaginella sobolifera, also known as the resurrection fern or resurrection plant, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Selaginella, a group of plants commonly referred to as spike mosses. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella sobolifera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in water to harness its medicinal properties, while it is also used in herbal supplements and tonics.
